top_signals.title: Oil Terminal in Russia’s St. Petersburg Comes Under Attack
top_signals.summary: Kyiv’s forces attacked an oil terminal in St. Petersburg, Russia’s second largest city, with drones overnight, local officials said, while Ukraine said a gas production facility was struck by Russia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Poland teams up with Spain to double tanker aircraft purchase
top_signals.summary: The agreement with Madrid will allow Warsaw to increase its tanker order to four units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US withdrew forces from Nigeria after operation against ISIS, AFRICOM chief says
top_signals.summary: AFRICOM Commander Gen. Dagvin Anderson described May’s joint U.S.-Nigerian as a model for future security cooperation in Africa.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
